author: yahya010
name: SP8192 Multi-Phase Global SGD TTT (4 phases) + QK-Gain 5.25
blurb: Builds on @jorge-asenjo's PR #1700 Multi-Phase Global SGD + Phased LoRA TTT stack (val_bpb 1.07219) with two hyperparameter changes: PHASED_TTT_NUM_PHASES raised from 3 to 4 (using the remaining eval budget for one more SGD adaptation pass), and QK_GAIN_INIT raised from 5.0 to 5.25 (matching merged SOTA PR #1493). No code changes; train_gpt.py is byte-identical to PR #1700.
technique_summary: SP8192 + 3-Layer Depth Recurrence + Parallel Residuals + QK-Gain 5.25 + EMA 0.9965 + Muon + VarLen Flash Attn3 + fused Triton MLP + GPTQ SDClip (int6 matrices, int7 embeddings) + Brotli + Multi-Phase Global SGD TTT + Phased LoRA TTT

attribution.full_base_stack: @jorge-asenjo (PR #1700) — Multi-Phase Global SGD TTT, Phased LoRA TTT, VarLen attention, fused Triton MLP, SP8192 pipeline
